name: Verify Numerical Reasoning
description: Measures numerical reasoning ability through analysis of data presented in charts, tables, and graphs. Candidates must evaluate, interpret, and draw logical conclusions from numerical data.

name: Verify Verbal Reasoning
description: Measures verbal reasoning ability through evaluation of written passages. Candidates must evaluate the logic of various kinds of argument and assess the implications of statements.

name: Verify Inductive Reasoning
description: Measures inductive reasoning ability — the ability to recognise patterns and draw conclusions from limited data sets. A strong predictor of problem-solving ability.

name: Verify Deductive Reasoning
description: Measures deductive reasoning ability — the ability to draw logical conclusions from a set of general information. Assesses logical thinking in candidate selection.

name: Verify Mechanical Comprehension
description: Measures the ability to understand and apply mechanical and physical concepts. Used for technical, engineering, and trades roles.

name: Verify Spatial Reasoning
description: Measures the ability to visualize, manipulate, and interpret spatial relationships between objects. Useful for design, engineering, and technical roles.

name: Verify G+ Cognitive Ability
description: A comprehensive cognitive ability test combining numerical, verbal, and inductive reasoning. A powerful general mental ability measure for all professional roles.

name: Motivation Questionnaire (MQ)
description: Measures an individual's motivational drives and preferences in the workplace. Identifies what energizes and what de-motivates an individual, covering 18 dimensions of motivation including achievement, development, and social connection.

name: Universal Competency Framework (UCF)
description: Measures key competency areas that are relevant across multiple job roles and industries. Evaluates competencies including leading and deciding, supporting and cooperating, and adapting and coping.

name: Java 8 (New)
description: Assesses knowledge of Java 8 programming language concepts including object-oriented programming, lambda expressions, stream API, and modern Java features. Ideal for software developer and engineer roles.

name: Python (New)
description: Evaluates knowledge of Python programming including core syntax, data structures, object-oriented programming, and common libraries. Suitable for data scientists, backend developers, and automation engineers.

name: JavaScript (New)
description: Assesses JavaScript skills including ES6+ features, DOM manipulation, asynchronous programming, and modern web development concepts.

name: SQL (New)
description: Tests knowledge of SQL fundamentals including querying, filtering, joining tables, aggregating data, and writing complex database queries.

name: .NET Framework 4.5
description: Evaluates knowledge of the .NET Framework including C#, ASP.NET, WCF, and core framework features used in enterprise application development.

name: Technology Professional 8.0 (MQ)
description: Measures motivations and preferences for technology professionals. Assesses what drives performance and engagement in technical roles.

name: Graduate 8.0 (G+)
description: A cognitive ability battery specifically normed for graduate-level candidates. Combines verbal, numerical, and inductive reasoning to assess overall intellectual ability for graduate hiring programs.

name: Manager 8.0
description: A comprehensive assessment for managers combining cognitive ability and personality. Predicts management effectiveness, leadership, and decision-making quality.

name: Executive 8.0
description: Designed for senior executive and C-suite assessment. Measures cognitive ability and executive personality dimensions including strategic vision, leadership, and executive presence.

name: Customer Contact Aptitude Battery
description: Designed for customer service and contact center roles. Assesses verbal reasoning, customer service scenarios, and basic numerical ability relevant to frontline customer-facing positions.

name: Situational Judgment Test (SJT)
description: Presents candidates with realistic workplace scenarios and asks them to evaluate and choose the most effective responses. Assesses practical judgment and decision-making in work contexts.

name: Sales Assessment (CCSQ)
description: Comprehensive assessment for sales roles measuring motivation, personality, and cognitive ability. Identifies candidates with the drive, interpersonal skills, and resilience needed for sales success.

name: Data Entry Speed and Accuracy
description: Measures speed and accuracy of data entry skills, including both numeric and alphanumeric data entry. Widely used for administrative and clerical roles.

name: Verbal Comprehension Assessment
description: Assesses a candidate's ability to understand written information, follow verbal instructions, and communicate effectively in a professional context.

name: Checking (Attention to Detail)
description: Measures attention to detail by requiring candidates to compare and check information for errors. Suitable for administrative, finance, and quality assurance roles.

name: Financial Analysis Simulation
description: A work simulation for finance roles requiring candidates to analyze financial data, interpret reports, and make recommendations under realistic conditions.

name: InBox Simulation
description: Simulates a manager's email inbox and requires candidates to respond to realistic workplace communications, prioritize tasks, and make decisions under time pressure.

name: General Ability (GCAT)
description: A short, adaptive cognitive ability test designed for high-volume screening. Measures general cognitive ability quickly and efficiently for a wide range of roles.

name: Safety Assessment
description: Assesses safety awareness, rule compliance, and risk aversion. Identifies candidates with the attitudes and knowledge needed to maintain safe workplace behaviors.

name: Numerical Reasoning (Entry Level)
description: A numerical reasoning test calibrated for entry-level and frontline roles. Assesses ability to work with numbers, percentages, and basic arithmetic in work contexts.

name: Technical Test: C Programming
description: Evaluates C programming skills including memory management, pointers, data structures, and system-level programming concepts.

name: Technical Test: C++ Programming
description: Assesses C++ programming skills including OOP concepts, templates, STL, and modern C++ features.

name: Resilience and Mental Toughness
description: Assesses an individual's resilience, mental toughness, and capacity to maintain performance under pressure. Suitable for high-stress environments and demanding roles.

name: Operational Management Simulation
description: A realistic work simulation for operational manager roles. Tests prioritization, resource management, stakeholder communication, and decision-making in a fast-paced environment.

name: Workplace English Language Test (WELT)
description: Assesses English language proficiency in workplace contexts. Measures reading, listening, and comprehension skills needed for professional communication.

name: Scales for Effective Leadership (SEL)
description: Measures key leadership competencies through a structured assessment. Evaluates potential across strategic, people, and change leadership dimensions.

name: Sales Achievement Predictor (SAP)
description: Predicts sales performance through a specialized personality questionnaire. Measures dimensions most predictive of sales success including persistence, competitiveness, and relationship building.

name: Entry Level Customer Service Scenario
description: A situational judgment test designed for frontline customer service roles. Presents realistic customer interactions and assesses how candidates handle service challenges.

name: Agile Methodology (Knowledge)
description: Tests understanding of Agile principles, methodologies, and practices including Scrum, Kanban, and sprint planning.

name: Cybersecurity Knowledge Assessment
description: Assesses knowledge of cybersecurity principles, threat detection, network security, and security best practices.

name: Project Management (Knowledge)
description: Evaluates knowledge of project management principles including planning, scheduling, risk management, and stakeholder communication.

name: Call Center Aptitude Test
description: Designed for call center and contact center roles. Assesses data entry accuracy, basic numeracy, attention to detail, and customer interaction scenarios.

name: General Sales Aptitude (GSA)
description: Assesses core aptitudes required for sales roles including numerical reasoning, verbal reasoning, and sales-relevant behavioral tendencies.

name: Big 5 Personality Assessment
description: Measures the five fundamental dimensions of personality — Openness, Conscientiousness, Extraversion, Agreeableness, and Neuroticism — relevant to workplace performance.

name: Managerial and Graduate Item Bank (MGIB)
description: A comprehensive item bank of cognitive ability questions calibrated for graduate and managerial candidates. Covers verbal, numerical, and abstract reasoning.

name: Occupational Personality Questionnaire OPQ32r
description: The OPQ32r is SHL's flagship occupational personality questionnaire. Measures 32 workplace behaviour dimensions across relationships with people, thinking style, and feelings and emotions. The gold-standard instrument for selection, development, and leadership assessment across all levels.

name: OPQ Universal Competency Report 2.0
description: A report generated from OPQ32r results that provides a comprehensive view of a candidate's competency potential across SHL's Universal Competency Framework. Covers leading and deciding, supporting and cooperating, interacting and presenting, analysing and interpreting, creating and conceptualising, organising and executing, adapting and coping, and enterprising and performing.

name: OPQ Leadership Report
description: A leadership-focused report derived from OPQ32r results. Maps personality dimensions to leadership competencies and provides insight into leadership style, leadership strengths and development areas, and suitability against leadership benchmarks.

name: Smart Interview Live Coding
description: An adaptive live-coding interview format where the assessment panel can administer role-specific programming tasks in any language. Suitable for senior technical roles where no dedicated knowledge test exists in the catalog, or where a hands-on coding evaluation is preferred.

name: Linux Programming (General)
description: Assesses knowledge of Linux programming concepts including shell scripting, system calls, process management, file systems, and general systems-level programming.

name: Networking and Implementation (New)
description: Evaluates knowledge of networking fundamentals including TCP/IP, DNS, HTTP, load balancing, and network infrastructure implementation concepts.

name: SVAR Spoken English (US) (New)
description: Automated spoken English language screen calibrated for the US accent. Assesses spoken English fluency, pronunciation, and comprehension for contact centre and customer-facing roles where English US is the operational language.

name: Contact Center Call Simulation (New)
description: A standalone, modern simulation focused purely on the in-call interaction for contact centre roles. Tests how candidates handle realistic inbound customer calls. Preferred for high-volume screening of entry-level contact centre agents.

name: Entry Level Customer Serv - Retail & Contact Center
description: A bundled personality and competency solution designed for entry-level customer service roles in retail and contact centres. Measures service orientation, teamwork, and behavioral fit for frontline customer-facing work.

name: Customer Service Phone Simulation
description: An older, comprehensive bundled solution combining biodata, personality, and simulation in one package. Tests customer service attitudes and phone interaction skills. Often used for finalist-stage depth assessment after volume screening.

name: SHL Verify Interactive – Numerical Reasoning
description: Interactive adaptive numerical reasoning test. Measures ability to analyse and interpret numerical data presented in tables, graphs, and charts. Widely used for graduate and professional roles requiring quantitative reasoning.

name: Financial Accounting (New)
description: Tests knowledge of financial accounting principles including double-entry bookkeeping, financial statements, balance sheets, income statements, and GAAP concepts.

name: Basic Statistics (New)
description: Evaluates knowledge of statistical concepts including descriptive statistics, probability, hypothesis testing, regression basics, and data interpretation.

name: Graduate Scenarios
description: SHL's situational judgment test designed specifically for graduate-level candidates. Presents realistic workplace scenarios relevant to recent graduates entering professional environments. Assesses practical judgment and decision-making in work contexts.

name: Global Skills Assessment
description: A self-reported skills assessment measuring competencies and knowledge across a broad range of professional skills. Used for talent audits, re-skilling initiatives, and L&D planning. Provides a baseline of current skill levels across an organisation.

name: Global Skills Development Report
description: A development report derived from Global Skills Assessment results. Provides personalised learning and development recommendations to support re-skilling and upskilling initiatives.

name: OPQ MQ Sales Report
description: A sales-specific report generated from OPQ32r personality results (and optionally enriched with Motivation Questionnaire data). Provides sales-language feedback on OPQ personality dimensions most predictive of sales success, including persistence, competitiveness, and customer focus. The MQ addition reveals sales motivators and drives.

name: Sales Transformation 2.0 - Individual Contributor
description: Measures how sales individual contributors show up in a digital-first, modern selling environment. Assesses behaviours critical to sales transformation including social selling, virtual engagement, and digital CRM adoption.

name: Dependability and Safety Instrument (DSI)
description: A standalone personality instrument measuring integrity, reliability, and safety attitudes. Predicts whether candidates will actually follow safety procedures in practice. Used across sectors for safety-critical roles. Distinct from knowledge tests: measures disposition to behave safely, not just safety knowledge.

name: Manufac. & Indust. - Safety & Dependability 8.0
description: A sector-specific bundled personality solution for manufacturing and industrial workforces. Measures safety-relevant personality with norms calibrated to industrial populations. Preferred over DSI when hiring for industrial-classified facilities and operations.

name: HIPAA (Security)
description: Tests knowledge of HIPAA security provisions including protected health information (PHI) handling, data access controls, breach notification requirements, and security rule implementation.

name: Medical Terminology (New)
description: Assesses knowledge of medical terminology including anatomical terms, clinical abbreviations, diagnostic terms, and healthcare vocabulary used in patient records and clinical documentation.

name: Microsoft Word 365 - Essentials (New)
description: Combined knowledge and simulation assessment for Microsoft Word 365 essentials. Tests practical document creation, formatting, and editing skills in a simulated Word environment.

name: MS Excel (New)
description: A short knowledge-only test of Microsoft Excel concepts including formulas, functions, formatting, data sorting, and filtering. Tests conceptual understanding without requiring hands-on simulation. Fast to administer.

name: MS Word (New)
description: A short knowledge-only test of Microsoft Word concepts including document formatting, styles, track changes, and word processing fundamentals. Tests conceptual understanding without requiring hands-on simulation.

name: Microsoft Excel 365 (New)
description: A comprehensive knowledge and simulation assessment for Microsoft Excel 365. Combines conceptual knowledge questions with hands-on simulation tasks in an actual Excel environment. More thorough than the knowledge-only MS Excel (New) test.

name: Microsoft Word 365 (New)
description: A comprehensive knowledge and simulation assessment for Microsoft Word 365. Combines conceptual knowledge questions with hands-on simulation tasks in an actual Word environment.

name: Core Java (Advanced Level) (New)
description: Advanced Java knowledge test covering concurrency, JVM internals, performance tuning, generics, design patterns, and enterprise Java concepts. Appropriate for senior engineers owning production microservices. Entry-level variant exists for graduate/junior candidates.

name: Spring (New)
description: Tests knowledge of the Spring framework including Spring Boot, Spring MVC, dependency injection, Spring Data, Spring Security, and RESTful API development with Spring.

name: RESTful Web Services (New)
description: Assesses knowledge of RESTful API design principles including HTTP methods, status codes, authentication, API versioning, and best practices for web service design.

name: Amazon Web Services (AWS) Development (New)
description: Tests knowledge of AWS development services including Lambda, EC2, S3, RDS, IAM, CloudFormation, and cloud-native application development patterns.

name: Docker (New)
description: Evaluates knowledge of Docker including containerisation concepts, Dockerfile creation, Docker Compose, networking, volumes, and container orchestration basics.

name: SHL Verify Interactive G+
description: SHL's flagship adaptive cognitive ability test combining inductive, numerical, and deductive reasoning in a single interactive assessment. Predicts learning ability and adaptability — not just current knowledge. Standard cognitive battery for professional, graduate, and senior roles. Also known as Verify G+.

name: SVAR Spoken English (UK) (New)
description: Automated spoken English language screen calibrated for the UK accent.

name: SVAR Spoken English (Australian) (New)
description: Automated spoken English language screen calibrated for the Australian accent.

name: SVAR Spoken English (Indian) (New)
description: Automated spoken English language screen calibrated for the Indian accent.

name: Workplace Health and Safety (New)
description: Tests knowledge of workplace health and safety regulations, hazard identification, risk assessment, and safety procedures. Complements personality-based safety instruments.

name: Angular (New)
description: Tests knowledge of Angular framework including components, services, directives, routing, reactive forms, and TypeScript integration.
